description: Turn harness-llm-wiki into a real artifact-driven closed-loop system with a unified run command, aligned routing and parser execution, formal patch lifecycle, real lint and harness gates, and raw-file regression coverage.

userStories.title: Add a unified pipeline run command
userStories.description: As a system operator, I want one command to run the full pipeline so that I do not have to manually chain partial CLI commands.
acceptanceCriteria: A new `docos run <source_path>` or `docos ingest --run-all <source_path>` command exists in CLI help output
Running the command invokes ingest, route, parse, normalize, extract, compile, patch, lint, eval, gate, review route, and report in a single flow
If a stage fails, the command exits with a machine-readable error that names the failing stage
python -m mypy docos/ exits with code 0
python -m pytest tests/ -q exits with code 0
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Create and persist a RunManifest for each run
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I want each run to create a persistent RunManifest so that the pipeline can be traced by `run_id` after the process exits.
acceptanceCriteria: Each unified run creates a real `run_id` and writes a RunManifest artifact to disk
The RunManifest stores `run_id`, `source_id`, `source_file_path`, `started_at`, and `finished_at`
A fresh process can reload a saved RunManifest by `run_id`
python -m mypy docos/ exits with code 0
python -m pytest tests/ -q exits with code 0
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Record per-stage lifecycle fields in the RunManifest
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I want every stage to record its timing and status in the RunManifest so that partial and failed runs remain auditable.
acceptanceCriteria: Each stage records its name, status, `started_at`, `finished_at`, and `error_detail` in the RunManifest
A failed run leaves completed stages marked complete and later stages marked not started or skipped
At least one test covers a failure case and asserts the recorded failing stage in the RunManifest
python -m mypy docos/ exits with code 0
python -m pytest tests/ -q exits with code 0
Typecheck passes

acceptanceCriteria: Ingest writes the raw source copy, source registry record, and content hash to persistent storage
Route writes `signals.json`, `route_decision.json`, and route scoring details to persistent storage
The RunManifest links to the ingest and route artifact paths

acceptanceCriteria: Parse writes parser attempt logs, parse results, and debug assets to persistent storage

acceptanceCriteria: Extract writes knowledge artifacts including entities, claims, and relations to persistent storage

userStories.description: As a system operator, I want the report command to summarize the full persisted run state so that inspection does not depend on live process memory.
acceptanceCriteria: `docos report <run_id>` shows source registry info, route result, parser attempts, fallback state, DocIR summary, knowledge summary, patch state, lint summary, harness result, release decision, and review status
A failed run report includes the failing stage and error details from the RunManifest or persisted stage artifact

acceptanceCriteria: The CLI can create a new run from an existing `source_id`
